manifest.name: React WebMCP Docs Syncer
manifest.description: Keeps React WebMCP documentation aligned when the package changes.

inboundTrigger.sourceCode: export default { async handle(event, ctx) { if (event.type !== 'github.push') return ctx.noop('Not a push event.'); if (event.payload.repository.full_name !== 'WebMCP-org/npm-packages') return ctx.noop('Different repository.'); const changed = event.payload.commits?.flatMap((commit) => [...(commit.added ?? []), ...(commit.modified ?? []), ...(commit.removed ?? [])]) ?? []; const relevant = changed.filter((file) => file.startsWith('packages/react-webmcp/')); if (relevant.length === 0) return ctx.noop('No React WebMCP package files changed.'); return ctx.dispatchSelf({ reason: 'React WebMCP package changed', files: relevant.slice(0, 50), after: event.payload.after }); } };
